  "Secret": "RSA ",
  "File": "src/yashigani/sso/saml.py",
  "SymlinkFile": "",
  "Commit": "105be23c4a613e44e1f4bb701b26d8ba8656008b",
  "Link": "https://github.com/agnosticsec-com/yashigani/blob/105be23c4a613e44e1f4bb701b26d8ba8656008b/src/yashigani/sso/saml.py#L58",
  "Entropy": 2,
  "Author": "tr",
  "Email": "tr@agnosticsec.com",
  "Date": "2026-05-14T22:18:43Z",
  "Message": "feat(saml): enforce RSA SP key at runtime — ACS-RISK-044 mitigation

Rationale
---------
ACS-RISK-044 (CVE-2026-41989): libgcrypt ECDH heap-buffer-overflow in
gcry_pk_decrypt.  The vulnerable code path is only reachable when the SAML
SP private key is EC-type (ECDH-ES key-transport in an EncryptedAssertion
triggers the ECDH branch in xmlsec1 → libgcrypt).  RSA SP keys route to
RSA decryption and never reach gcry_pk_decrypt.

The standard install.sh generates RSA SP keys (openssl genrsa), so the
deployment default is already safe.  This commit code-enforces the invariant
so an operator cannot accidentally swap in an EC key without receiving a
clear startup error.

Enforcement point
-----------------
src/yashigani/sso/saml.py  _assert_rsa_sp_key()  (line 22)
Called from: SAMLProvider.__init__ (line 134)

Check fires once at provider init time, not on every SAML request.
Fail-closed: non-RSA key → ValueError immediately; provider is not created;
SAML feature cannot be used.  RSA keys proceed as today.

Error message shape
-------------------
  "SAML SP key must be RSA (mitigates ACS-RISK-044 / CVE-2026-41989).
   Got: EllipticCurvePrivateKey.
   EC/EdDSA/DSA SP keys are not permitted — PQR support is deferred.
   Regenerate with: openssl genrsa -out sp_key.pem 4096"

The check handles both python3-saml stripped-body format (no PEM headers)
and full PEM (headers present); PKCS#8 format primary, PKCS#1 RSA fallback.

Tests added
-----------
src/tests/unit/test_v2234_rsa_sp_key_enforcement.py  — 10 tests, all green

  test_rsa_key_accepted                  RSA PKCS#8 body — no raise
  test_ec_key_rejected                   P-256 PKCS#8 body — ValueError
  test_dsa_key_rejected                  DSA PKCS#8 body — ValueError
  test_error_message_cites_acs_risk_044  message contains "ACS-RISK-044"
  test_error_message_cites_remediation   message contains "openssl genrsa"
  test_rsa_full_pem_accepted             full RSA PEM (with headers) — no raise
  test_ec_full_pem_rejected              full EC PEM (with headers) — ValueError
  test_saml_provider_init_rsa_succeeds   SAMLProvider.__init__ RSA path — OK
  test_saml_provider_init_ec_raises      SAMLProvider.__init__ EC path — ValueError
  test_saml_provider_init_dsa_raises     SAMLProvider.__init__ DSA path — ValueError

grep consumers of _assert_rsa_sp_key / SAMLProvider.__init__:
  src/yashigani/sso/saml.py:134           definition + call site
  src/yashigani/auth/broker.py:114        _saml_providers dict (populated at IdP add time)
  src/yashigani/sso/__init__.py:3,8       barrel re-export (unchanged)

Out of scope: install.sh (Su parallel), ACS-RISK-045 (separate class),
PQR support (deferred per Tiago 2026-05-14).",
  "Tags": [
   "key",
   "private-key",
   "pem"
  ],
